Test Scenario: On the login page, there is no option available to reset login credentials in case a user forgets their username or password. This may prevent users from regaining access to their accounts and negatively impact usability.
Expected Result: It is recommended to provide a hyperlink or a button on the login page that allows users to navigate to the password reset page in case they forget their credentials. This will improve user experience and ensure smoother account recovery.

Test Scenario: On the Dashboard screen, the top-right “New Lease” button placeholder border is visible, and the button appears only when the mouse is hovered over it. This may cause confusion for users, as the button is not clearly visible by default.
Expected Result: It is recommended to make the “New Lease” button clearly visible at all times without requiring mouse hover, to improve discoverability and enhance user experience.

Test Scenario: In the Properties section, the Export button is not functioning as expected. Clicking the button does not trigger any action or export process.
Expected Result: It is recommended to enable the Export functionality to allow users to successfully export the data in Excel format, ensuring data can be easily downloaded and used for reporting or analysis purposes.

Test Scenario: In the Properties module, the Import button is not working as expected. Clicking the button does not initiate any import action or prompt the user to upload a file.
Expected Result: Enable import the data from excel format and there should be option to download the import template. It is expected to see this button as action button in which export template and import both option should be available.

Test Scenario: Add New Property - In the Add New Property modal, when a user removes an attached image, the image count is not updated accordingly and remains the same. This results in an incorrect image count being displayed to the user.
Expected Result: It is expected that the image count should update dynamically when a user removes an attached image, ensuring the displayed count accurately reflects the current number of images.

Test Scenario: Add Property Button - In the Add Property feature, the entered data is not being saved. After submitting the form, the property details are not stored or reflected in the system as expected.
Expected Result: It is recommended to ensure the Submit button functions correctly and saves all entered field data successfully upon submission.

Test Scenario: Add your first property - In the “Add Your First Property” screen, previously entered data is displayed; however, clicking on “Create Property” does not save the newly supplied data. As a result, the property is not created as expected.
Expected Result: It is recommended to ensure the Submit button functions correctly and saves all entered field data successfully upon submission.

Test Scenario: The “Clear Filters” button is not working as expected. Clicking the button does not reset or clear the applied filters.
Expected Result: It is recommended that the Clear Filters button should function properly and remove all applied filters, allowing users to view the complete set of data.

Test Scenario: In the Edit Property modal, the Update Property button is not functioning as expected. Clicking the button does not update or save the modified property details.
Expected Result: It is recommended that the Edit Property functionality should save all updated data correctly when the Update Property button is clicked, ensuring changes are reflected in the system.

Test Scenario: In the Edit Property modal, it is not loading the data in the corresponding fields, moreover all the fields are appearing empty except "Property Features"
Expected Result: It is recommended that when the Edit Property modal is opened, it should automatically load the corresponding property data, allowing users to view and modify existing information accurately.

Test Scenario: In the Add Property feature, the entered data is not being saved. After submitting the form, the property details are not stored or reflected in the system as expected.
Expected Result: It is recommended to ensure the Submit button functions correctly and saves all entered field data successfully upon submission.

Test Scenario: In the Property List, the action options — Edit Property, View Property, Add Property, Manage Property, Property Settings, and Delete Property — are not working as expected. Selecting any of these actions does not trigger the corresponding functionality.
Expected Result: It is recommended to fix and validate all the above action functionalities (Edit Property, View Property, Add Property, Manage Property, Property Settings, and Delete Property) so that users can use them as intended without any issues.

Test Scenario: In the Units section, the Export button is not functioning as expected. Clicking the button does not trigger any action or export process.
Expected Result: It is recommended to enable the Export functionality to allow users to successfully export the data in Excel format, ensuring data can be easily downloaded and used for reporting or analysis purposes.

Test Scenario: In the Units section, the Import button is not working as expected. Clicking the button does not initiate any import action or prompt the user to upload a file.

Test Scenario: In the Add Unit modal, the Create Unit button is not visible by default. However, when the user places the mouse pointer at the bottom-right area of the modal, the button becomes visible. This indicates a UI visibility or layout issue.
Expected Result: It is expected that the Create Unit button should be clearly visible at all times. If needed, a hover effect can be added for better user interaction, but the button should not depend on hover for visibility.

Test Scenario: In the Edit Units modal, it is not loading the data in the corresponding fields, moreover all the fields are appearing empty.
Expected Result: It is recommended that when the Edit Unit modal is opened, it should automatically load the corresponding property data, allowing users to view and modify existing information accurately.

Test Scenario: In the Edit Units modal, the Update Unit button is not functioning as expected. Clicking the button does not update or save the modified unit details.
Expected Result: It is recommended that the Edit unit functionality should save all updated data correctly when the Update Unit button is clicked, ensuring changes are reflected in the system.

Test Scenario: Add Unit Button - In the Add Units feature, the entered data is not being saved. After submitting the form, the unit details are not stored or reflected in the system as expected.
Expected Result: It is recommended to ensure the Create Unit button functions correctly and saves all entered field data successfully upon submission.

Test Scenario: Under the Unit Edit modal, the following functionalities are not working as expected: Photos, Virtual Tour, Share, Export, Delete, etc. Clicking on these options does not trigger the corresponding actions.
Expected Result: It is recommended to develop, enable, and thoroughly test the above functionalities (Photos, Virtual Tour, Share, Export, Delete, etc.) within the Unit Edit modal to ensure they work correctly and provide a smooth user experience.

Test Scenario: Under the Unit Details section, the Document Attachment and Download Document options are not working as expected. Users are unable to attach documents or download the uploaded documents successfully.
Expected Result: It is recommended that the Document Attachment and Download Document functionalities under Unit Details should work correctly, allowing users to successfully upload and download documents as intended.

Test Scenario: When the Add New Unit modal is opened, the Additional tab is displayed by default instead of the Basic Info tab.
Expected Result: It is recommended to set the Basic Info tab as the default tab when the Add New Unit modal is opened, ensuring a more intuitive and user-friendly data entry flow.

Test Scenario: Under the Unit modal, if the user does not provide the mandatory fields, no alert or validation message is displayed to inform the user that required information is missing. Additionally, the system does not set focus or navigate to the tab containing the mandatory fields needed to create or update the unit.
Expected Result: It is recommended to implement proper validation for mandatory fields in the Unit modal. The system should display clear alert or validation messages when required information is missing and automatically set focus or navigate to the relevant tab containing the mandatory fields to guide the user in completing the form.

Test Scenario: Under Unit Analytics, the Export functionality is not working as expected. Initiating the export action does not generate or download the analytics data.
Expected Result: It is recommended to fix and enable the Export functionality under Unit Analytics so that users can successfully export the analytics data as intended.

Test Scenario: Under Leads Analytics, the Export functionality is not working as expected. Initiating the export action does not generate or download the analytics data.
Expected Result: It is recommended to fix and enable the Export functionality under Leads Analytics so that users can successfully export the analytics data as intended.

Test Scenario: Under the New Lead feature, within the UAE Details tab, the Nationality dropdown is not displaying all country names and the listed countries are not arranged alphabetically. This may cause difficulty for users in selecting the correct nationality.
Expected Result: If a limited list of nationalities is to be maintained, it is recommended to at least arrange the country names alphabetically in the dropdown to improve usability and make it easier for users to find and select the correct nationality.

Expected Result: It is recommended to arrange the locations in the Preferred Location dropdown alphabetically to enhance usability and allow users to easily find and select the desired location.

Test Scenario: Under the New Lead feature, within the Assignment tab, the Assigned to dropdown displays person names that are not arranged alphabetically. This may make it difficult for users to quickly find and select the desired location.
